heading: Limit the Results
body:
We recommend setting limits for the number of results to return for each
sub-pipeline. If the pipeline stage inside the
[$rankFusion](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/rankFusion) or [$scoreFusion](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/scoreFusion) input pipeline doesn't support limiting the number of results (such
as [$search](pipe.$search)), we recommend that you use [$limit](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/limit)
subsequently inside the input pipeline to limit the number of documents
that [$rankFusion](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/rankFusion) or [$scoreFusion](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/scoreFusion) evaluates.
